title: schizachyrium scoparium var. divergens
intro: Schizachyrium scoparium var. divergens, also known as Little Bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Little Bluestem include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
